text:
The movie *La Dolce Vita* was directed by **Federico Fellini**.

Federico Fellini was a highly acclaimed Italian film director and screenwriter, widely regarded as one of the most influential filmmakers of the 20th century. *La Dolce Vita*, released in 1960, is one of his most famous and iconic works.

FINAL ANSWER: The movie *La Dolce Vita* was directed by Federico Fellini.
